description: Principal payment method card. 88×88 brand tile + masked PAN with last 4 emphasized + '<Brand> Card' subtitle + edit/delete row + dark 'Default' pill at top-right. No shadow. Built for the primary slot on settings/financeiro/metodos-pagamento.
sourcePrompt: Adapt Creative Tim payment-method-01 (default card variant only) — use Visa flag, drop the shadow, keep the Default badge. Replace the principal card pattern on metodos-pagamento.
